content.en:
Many high-level realm gods were very worried about safety, but Ye Tian was extremely looking forward to it.

Not to mention anything else, the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass alone made him extremely excited, although it was very dangerous, he couldn't take these Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, but it was enough to prove that the Death Void was full of treasures, but he didn't have the strength to match them, so he couldn't take these treasures.

"No wonder the strength of the supreme forces far surpasses that of the top forces, they can enter the Death Void, and the resources they obtain are unimaginable, and the resources that help break through the peak realm gods are also a lot here. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

But relatively speaking, there are also many dangers here, and the supreme forces are afraid that many high-level realm gods have fallen in the Death Void, and even peak realm gods.

However, they can also cultivate peak realm gods more easily, and the losses are definitely not worth mentioning compared to the gains.

In short, once the Supreme Force is able to explore the Death Void, it will inevitably increase its strength in the future, far surpassing the scale of the top forces.

But the premise of everything is to be able to explore the Death Void, and promotion to the Supreme Force is only the minimum standard.

A top force like the Huoyang True Sect, even if it doesn't have the previous things, and if it goes one step further and is promoted to a supreme force, it is not qualified to explore in the Death Void, and its strength is still a little worse~.

"This time, if I'm lucky, I'll be qualified to gain a foothold in the Death Void!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

After a long time, the boundless sailing ship of the gods of the Sumeru realm finally reached the purpose of this time, the unknown treasure land.

"It's here!"

The voice of the god of the Sumeru realm came.

Many high-level realm gods looked into the distance and saw a gray area, faintly seeing the projections of some mountains and rivers, as well as various lights emitted.

The area of this treasure land is not large, and it is naturally not worth mentioning compared to the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, even if it is compared to a realm rift, it is not worth mentioning.

It's small.

However, in the Death Void, the speed of the high-level realm gods was too slow, and even such a small treasure land would take a long time to penetrate through it.

At this moment, most of the high-level realm gods were not very excited, but they all frowned.

In their eyes, this treasure land was already a place comparable to the abyss of the demon seed, and it was an extremely dangerous place.

But they are not qualified to refuse and must go in anyway.

"Let's all go in!"

The god of the Sumeru realm urged.

Seeing this, one after another high-level realm gods gritted their teeth and shuttled into this treasure land, and Ye Tian looked around, and knew that there was no way to leave at present.

Otherwise, he really wanted to get out of here first, and then condense a few copy bodies.

Now, you can only enter this treasure first.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian left from the boundless sailboat and entered this super treasure land.

In the blink of an eye, all the high-level realm gods entered.

Seeing that the high-level realm gods had all entered this treasure land, the Sumeru realm god smiled.

"Very good, although most of the high-level realm gods will fall, but the loss is not our Taihao Tianchao Palace's high-level realm gods, and every high-level realm god has to hand over half of the resources, no matter how you calculate it, our Taihao Tianchao Palace is all blood-earned!"

The god of the Sumeru realm muttered.

Of course, he wouldn't deliberately trap this group of high-level realm gods, after all, if the other supreme forces knew, they would definitely trouble Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace.

Therefore, as long as these high-level realm gods come out, they can really take away half of the resources.

If you're lucky, it's really possible that another supreme force will be born in the future of the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm.

I think that at the beginning, Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace was also a supreme force that was promoted, taking it for other supreme forces, sacrificing high-level realm gods in exchange for resources.

Subsequently.

The gods of the Sumeru realm are practicing here, waiting for these high-level realm gods to come out.

......

In the midst of the Extra-Dimensional Treasure Land.

After Ye Tian and the other high-level realm gods came in, they were moved to a certain area by the power of the extradimensional space.

After Ye Tian descended on this super dimensional treasure land, he didn't see other high-level realm gods, and the copying talent shrouded the surroundings, carefully probing.

"Safe for now!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, some high-level realm gods were unlucky, and were directly teleported to some extra-dimensional creatures by the power of the extra-dimensional space, in that case, even if the super-dimensional creatures ignored the high-level realm gods, they would easily bombard the high-level realm gods.

"Cohesion!"

Ye Tian quickly condensed a copy body.

He didn't know if his duplicate body would attract the attention of extradimensional creatures, so he also condensed a replica body with a lower cultivation, so that he would not be targeted by extradimensional creatures.

In short, he didn't want all of his replica bodies to fall, as long as one survived, he could continue to condense the other replica bodies.

Swish!

Ye Tian moved cautiously and went to find resources.

One of the purposes of this visit is to find more resources and treasures.

Soon.

Ye Tian's gaze was fixed on a flower, this flower contained a faint extradimensional power, and more pure energy, which was obviously a treasure.

So, he cautiously walked over.

Suddenly, the flower produced a strange fragrance.

After absorbing this strange fragrance, Ye Tian's will began to drowsy.

Immediately, he wanted to resist this strange fragrance, but no means could stop the fragrance from penetrating.

Obviously, the penetration of this fragrance contains the invasion of extradimensional power, and if his duplicate body is fused with extradimensional things, he will definitely be able to resist the fragrance, but now it is obviously impossible to do it.

"Retreat!"

Ye Tian forcibly held back his fainting and kept retreating, only then did he withdraw from the range of the aroma.

Obviously, the aroma cannot spread indefinitely.

After retreating to a safe place, Ye Tian found a way to get rid of the influence of the aroma.

However, after all, this aroma influence involved extradimensional power, and it could not be removed for a while.

"This treasure land prohibits extradimensional objects from the outside world from entering, but it has a unique extradimensional power inside. "

Along the way, he sensed the breath of superdimensional power, which seemed to be different, but in fact, they all came from the source of many superdimensional powers, and under the influence of that source, he gave birth to superdimensional power, so he was not expelled.

"It takes a long time to solve the effect of aroma, and it seems that we have to change the replication body!"

Ye Tian Dark Dao Gate.
